title: container.conf: support attributed string slices
body:
All `[]string`s in containers.conf have now been migrated to attributed string slices which require some adjustments in Buildah and Podman.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

#### What type of PR is this?

```release-note

```

comments.body: Changes LGTM, but there's apparently some kind of merge conflict with vendor/modules.txt

Now vendoring c/common@main.

Ready from my end: @rhatdan @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). One more run but I think the unit-test failures are legit.
Will have a look tomorrow.  I changed some very minor things in c/common which maybe are responsible.

Luuuucky me, it was a flake.

Ready to merge :heavy_check_mark:
